name: codex-copilot
description: Codex-native software specialist framework with tc-backed workflow discipline and Claude Copilot parity contracts.
author: Everyone Needs A Copilot

interface.shortDescription: Specialist playbooks and tc discipline for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Ports the Claude Copilot workflow into Codex-native instructions, skills, scripts, and plugin packaging while keeping tc as the execution record. The global plugin focuses on software creation specialists; optional domain capabilities live in dormant packs activated by projects.
defaultPrompt: Route this request through the codex-copilot protocol.
Use $ta, $me, and $qa with tc to ship this task.
Use $sd, $uxd, $uids, and $uid for product experience work.
Use Live Docs before coding against third-party APIs.
Set up a Codex specialist workflow for this repo.

cc.description: cc CLI for memory, skill discovery, config, env hydration, known references, and Live Docs.

tc.description: tc CLI for PRDs, tasks, streams, handoffs, and work products.
